log: REASONING: Throwing rock at Half-Elf — Unarmored Caster (distant).

REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:3+3=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:4+-2=2 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
